text.title: Single Operator Funnel Rubric Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every Single Operator Funnel Rubric application must enforce. These are HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: Rubric MUST be exactly four stages — visit, signup, paid, retained — never grow more without retiring one.
rule.rationale: Stage proliferation creates evidence-source debt the founder cannot honestly populate.

rule.statement: Each stage MUST have exactly one named evidence source pullable in <5 minutes; multiple sources per stage are rejected.
rule.rationale: Two sources turn the Friday slot into a reconciliation task instead of a diagnostic.

rule.statement: Every Friday entry MUST record absolute counts AND week-over-week deltas; absolute-only entries are rejected.
rule.rationale: Diagnostic value lives in the deltas; absolute numbers hide trend.

rule.statement: Largest WoW drop MUST be tagged BROKEN_STAGE and assigned next week's investigation slot; multi-stage drops still pick one.
rule.rationale: Solo founders fail by fixing three things at once; one tag = one committed action.

rule.statement: Total time budget MUST be ≤20 minutes per Friday; consistent overrun means the rubric is wrong (sources too slow), not that more time is needed.
rule.rationale: Weekly rhythms costing an hour get skipped within 6 weeks.
